release_notes: Schedule tab now detects and surfaces crew clashes — calls where a confirmed crew member is also booked on an overlapping or otherwise conflicting call. Detection runs server-side using the same check_conflict rules as Crew Finder (Rule 1 overlap, Rule 2 long-shift gap, Rule 3 venue change), so the schedule and Crew Finder always agree about what's a conflict. Clashing cells render orange with a pulsing border; hovering a cell or expanding a booking shows the clashing crew member names and the specific rule violation.
